positive: A minimalist, abstract illustration featuring a geometric golden retriever head profile integrated into a celestial motif. The design should use thick, clean linework and strong silhouettes, combining earthy tones (terracotta, sage green, burnt orange) with deep midnight blue and metallic gold accents. The style should be sophisticated neo-folk art meets mid-century modern illustration. Composition must be perfectly centered and scalable for apparel printing. Include subtle elements like crescent moons, constellations, and stylized mountain ranges framing the central animal subject. Clean background, vector art aesthetic, high contrast, highly detailed, perfect symmetry, isolated on white or transparent background.
